holdings.infoBox: MLPI is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are Enbridge stock at 9.93%, The Williams Companies at 9.22%, TC Energy at 6.93%, Pembina Pipeline at 6.12%, and Kinder Morgan at 5.60%.

overview.description: The NEOS MLP & Energy Infrastructure High Income ETF (MLPI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund aims to provide high monthly income by combining North American energy infrastructure exposure and a call-writing strategy. The fund is actively managed. MLPI was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Neos.
